INSERT INTO memory_context (userId, taskId, taskTitle, summary, keywords, memoryType, importance, expiresAt, createdAt) VALUES
(1, 810005, '[资源存档] L001 browser-use', 'CATEGORY:BROWSER_AUTOMATION | TYPE:GITHUB_LIB | LICENSE:MIT | STARS:84400 | LANG:Python | CORE:Python framework enabling LLM agents to control real Chromium browsers via natural language. CAPABILITIES:[LLM_driven_browser_control,custom_tool_extension,cloud_service_stealth_proxy_captcha,1000+_integrations,ChatBrowserUse_optimized_model,persistent_filesystem_memory] USAGE:[PIP,API,CLI] INTEGRATION_NOTES:Server-side Python module; invoke from tRPC via child_process or microservice; enables agent-driven web scraping for financial data; cloud version handles anti-bot. URL:https://github.com/browser-use/browser-use', 'browser-use,浏览器自动化,AI代理,Python,LLM,Chromium,网页抓取,金融数据采集', 'workflow', 5, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810006, '[资源存档] L002 Pine Script v6', 'CATEGORY:FINANCIAL_DATA | TYPE:DOCS_SITE | LICENSE:PROPRIETARY | LANG:Pine_Script | CORE:TradingView proprietary scripting language for custom indicators, strategies, libraries with full historical data access. CAPABILITIES:[custom_indicators,strategy_backtesting,forward_testing,150000+_community_scripts,alerts_orders_position_management] USAGE:[DOCS_REF_platform_only] INTEGRATION_NOTES:Cannot embed in TARGET_SYSTEM; value as reference for strategy logic reimplemented in Python/JS; community scripts provide algorithm inspiration for backtestEngine. URL:https://www.tradingview.com/pine-script-docs/', 'Pine Script,TradingView,交易策略,技术指标,回测,量化', 'workflow', 3, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810007, '[资源存档] L003 AI Shots', 'CATEGORY:NEWS | TYPE:NEWS_SITE | LICENSE:COMMERCIAL | CORE:AI-focused newsletter platform delivering curated AI industry news and technical developments. CAPABILITIES:[AI_news_analysis,email_subscription,historical_archive,search] USAGE:[WEB_APP_subscription] INTEGRATION_NOTES:No API; content consumption only; not integrable into TARGET_SYSTEM programmatically. URL:https://aishots.club/', 'AI新闻,简报,行业动态,订阅', 'workflow', 2, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810008, '[资源存档] L004 AiShort ChatGPT Shortcut', 'CATEGORY:PROMPT_ENGINEERING | TYPE:GITHUB_TOOL | LICENSE:MIT | STARS:14500 | LANG:TypeScript | CORE:Prompt management and distribution tool with curated library, one-click copy, smart search, tag filtering across 18 languages. CAPABILITIES:[curated_prompt_library,smart_search_tag_filter,18_languages,user_favorites_custom_prompts,community_sharing_JSON_export,browser_extension_Tampermonkey,multi_deployment] USAGE:[WEB_APP,DOCS_REF] INTEGRATION_NOTES:JSON export format importable into TARGET_SYSTEM prompt management module; MIT allows forking and embedding; browser extension overlays on any website. URL:https://github.com/rockbenben/ChatGPT-Shortcut', 'Prompt管理,提示词库,浏览器扩展,JSON导出,18语言', 'workflow', 3, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810009, '[资源存档] L005 AI Engineering Hub', 'CATEGORY:LLM_ENGINEERING | TYPE:GITHUB_TOOL | LICENSE:MIT | STARS:32700 | LANG:Python | CORE:93+ production-ready AI projects covering LLM, RAG, AI Agent, multi-agent systems with complete learning roadmap. CAPABILITIES:[93+_production_ready_projects,LLM_RAG_Agent_MultiAgent_tutorials,AI_Engineering_Roadmap,30+_framework_integrations] USAGE:[DOCS_REF] INTEGRATION_NOTES:Reference architecture patterns for upgrading analysis engine; RAG patterns for document analysis; multi-agent patterns for 5-agent parallel analysis upgrade. URL:https://github.com/patchy631/ai-engineering-hub', 'AI工程,RAG,多智能体,生产就绪,学习路径,LLM', 'workflow', 4, NULL, NOW());
